description: You are a mechanical engineer designing a side panel for an electronics enclosure. Create a fully-constrained 2D sketch in SolveSpace of a rectangular panel profile centered at the origin (0, 0). The profile must have overall bounding dimensions of 80mm wide by 50mm tall, with a 5mm x 5mm square notch removed from all four corners, forming a single closed shape of 12 horizontal and vertical line segments. Save the completed file to /home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/notched_panel.slvs
